ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "header" TEXT /* Header identifier for the dataset */,
  "nMess" INTEGER /* Number of messages in the dataset */,
  "nObs" INTEGER /* Number of observations in the dataset */,
  "Kbytes" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in kilobytes */,
  "hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the dataset for integrity checks */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center or organization that provided the data */,
  "table_version" TEXT /* Table version of the dataset */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition number of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source type of the data (e.g., ground station, satellite, laboratory) */,
  "geographical_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the dataset */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality status of the dataset (e.g., raw, processed, verified) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the center or organization */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the center */,
  "center_type" TEXT /* Type of center (e.g., government, private, academic) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
